# v1.287 — Parts Table Pricing + Freight Charge Label

## What's New

### Manage Parts Modal
- **Wholesale** and **Retail Price** columns added to the parts table
- Displayed between Qty and Quick columns
- Formatted as `$X.XX` or `—` if not set
- Wholesale shows in dark text; Retail shows in green

### Parts Form
- **Core Charge** field renamed to **Freight Charge**
- UI label only — database column (`core_charge`) unchanged, no migration needed

## Rollback
To roll back to v1.286: `git reset --hard v1.286 && git push --force`
